headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Keurig Dr Pepper, Raises Price Target to $38
summary: UBS  analyst Peter Grom   maintains Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) with a Buy and raises the price target from $34 to $38.

headline: PepsiCo: Dividend King With Double-Digit Total Return Potential
